statement.en: [Call for Papers] Ethical implications of artificial intelligence (AI) and automation in service industries: Addressing algorithmic bias, opacity and unclear accountability mechanisms

proposer: Mark Anthony Camilleri, Serena Strazzullo, Raffaele Campo et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a call for papers (meta-research solicitation), not a substantive axiom or claim. It proposes a research agenda on ethical implications of AI/automation that is actively evolving, not yet settled, and dependent on contributions not yet written. The underlying concerns (algorithmic bias, opacity, accountability) are documented problems, but their resolution status and formalization remain provisional.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 透明性なき信頼は、偏見と無責任の逆数に崩壊する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 中心の不透明さから、偏見と責任の軸が交錯し、信頼は裂け目に消える。
